name: meaw-ghop
description: Plays a sound when a terminal command fails with a non-zero exit code

commands.title: Terminal Error Sound: Set Sound File

terminalErrorSound.enabled.description: Enable or disable the terminal error sound notification

terminalErrorSound.soundFile.description: Absolute path to a custom .wav or .mp3 sound file. Leave empty to use the bundled default sound.

terminalErrorSound.volume.description: Playback volume for the error sound (0.0 to 1.0)

terminalErrorSound.cooldownMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between sound triggers to prevent repeated sounds

terminalErrorSound.useExitCodeDetection.description: Detect errors using terminal exit codes (requires shell integration)

terminalErrorSound.usePatternDetection.description: Detect errors using common error text patterns in terminal output

terminalErrorSound.customPatterns.description: Additional regex patterns to detect errors in terminal output
